ai-tech.name: OpenAI News
ai-tech.notes: Official OpenAI announcements and model/product updates.

ai-tech.name: OpenAI Platform Docs
ai-tech.notes: Use for API behavior, model capability, pricing/migration-sensitive claims.

ai-tech.name: Google AI Blog
ai-tech.notes: Official Google AI research and product updates.

ai-tech.name: GitHub Trending
ai-tech.notes: Use for discovery; verify project details in each repo.

ai-tech.name: Papers with Code
ai-tech.notes: Useful for paper-code links and benchmark discovery.

ai-tech.name: arXiv cs.AI/cs.LG/cs.CL
ai-tech.notes: Preprint source; check updates and versions.

ai-tech.name: Hugging Face Blog
ai-tech.notes: Good for open model and ecosystem technical posts.

ai-tech.name: 机器之心
ai-tech.notes: Chinese AI media for discovery and context.

ai-tech.name: 量子位
ai-tech.notes: Chinese AI/technology media for discovery and summaries.

crypto.name: CoinGecko API
crypto.notes: Public market data endpoints work without a key; use CRYPTO_API_KEY or COINGECKO_API_KEY when available for higher reliability.

crypto.name: Bitcoin.org
crypto.notes: Reference material for Bitcoin basics; not a news source.

crypto.name: SEC Crypto Assets and Cyber Unit
crypto.notes: Use for US regulatory and ETF-related primary documents.

crypto.name: CoinDesk
crypto.notes: Crypto specialist reporting; verify official claims.

crypto.name: DefiLlama API
crypto.notes: Free API for DeFi TVL, chain TVL, stablecoin supply, and yield-pool research.

economics.name: FRED
economics.notes: US and global macro time series from St. Louis Fed.

economics.name: BLS
economics.notes: US labor market and CPI primary source.

economics.name: BEA
economics.notes: US GDP, PCE, income, and national accounts.

economics.name: Federal Reserve
economics.notes: FOMC statements, minutes, speeches, and policy materials.

economics.name: US Treasury
economics.notes: Treasury data, fiscal materials, and yield curve references.

economics.name: SEC EDGAR
economics.notes: Primary US public-company filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and registration statements.

economics.name: IMF Data
economics.notes: Global macro datasets and IMF reports.

research.name: arXiv
research.notes: Primary source for preprints; check version history.

research.name: Semantic Scholar
research.notes: Useful for citation graph and related work discovery.

research.name: Google Scholar
research.notes: Discovery and citation lookup; verify details at publisher/arXiv.

research.name: GitHub
research.notes: Use repo README, releases, issues, and commits for code evidence.

research.name: ACL Anthology
research.notes: Primary source for ACL-family NLP papers.

cross-domain.name: Reuters
cross-domain.notes: High-quality general news for macro, policy, business, and markets.

cross-domain.name: Bloomberg
cross-domain.notes: Market and macro reporting; may be paywalled.

cross-domain.name: Financial Times
cross-domain.notes: Global business and markets context; may be paywalled.

cross-domain.name: GitHub
cross-domain.notes: Primary source for open-source project state.
